rows.cycle_goal_summary: Gather and craft immediate basic tool/shelter essentials starting from the known nearby crafting table: get planks/sticks if needed, then craft a wooden pickaxe (and/or other first-tier essentials) to enable safe mining for cobblestone and starter materials for a shared home.
rows.what_happened: Runtime classifier saw verifier=failed, tools=observe,inspect_chest,deposit_shared, statuses=observe:ok, inspect_chest:inspected, deposit_shared:blocked.

rows.cycle_goal_summary: Validate whether the actor has (or can quickly obtain) the required planks and sticks for a wooden pickaxe, accounting for any prior deposit to the shared chest; then set up the immediate crafting prerequisite state for a subsequent pickaxe craft attempt.
rows.what_happened: Runtime classifier saw verifier=passed, tools=observe,inspect_chest,wait, statuses=observe:ok, inspect_chest:inspected, wait:waited.
